headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Thermo Fisher Scientific, Lowers Price Target to $575
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $650 to $575.
